app_summary: RedReader is an Android application that allows users to access and interact with content from Reddit using the Reddit API. It provides a user-friendly interface for browsing subreddits, managing user accounts, and customizing app settings. The app requires users to accept the Reddit user agreement before accessing content.

core_workflows.description: Step 1: The user opens the app and sees the Reddit User Agreement screen (State 0) which displays the RedReader terms. Step 2: The user taps the 'Accept' button at the bottom of the agreement dialog, navigating to the Reddit User Agreement confirmation (State 10). Step 3: The user taps 'I Agree' to confirm acceptance, which loads the Front Page (State 11) showing a list of subscribed subreddits like 'art', 'askreddit', and 'aww'.
core_workflows.purpose: First-time user onboarding flow that gates access behind agreement acceptance.

core_workflows.description: Step 1: The user is on the Front Page (State 11) and taps the 'Themes' option in the menu. Step 2: The user selects a theme in the Themes screen (State 12). Step 3: The user presses the Android back button to return to the Reddit User Agreement confirmation (State 10).
core_workflows.purpose: Allows users to customize the app's appearance by changing themes.

core_workflows.description: Step 1: The user is on the Front Page (State 11) and taps the 'Settings' option in the menu. Step 2: The user selects 'Appearance' in the Settings menu (State 19) to open font settings (State 20). Step 3: The user adjusts the font scale using the global font scale adjustment menu (State 21).
core_workflows.purpose: Enables users to adjust the font scale globally and for specific elements within the app.

core_workflows.description: Step 1: The user is on the Front Page (State 11) and taps the 'Settings' option in the menu. Step 2: The user selects 'Appearance' in the Settings menu (State 19) to open font settings (State 20). Step 3: The user adjusts the font scale for post titles using the post titles font scale adjustment menu (State 22).
core_workflows.purpose: Allows users to customize the font scale for post titles within the app.

core_workflows.description: Step 1: The user is on the Front Page (State 11) and taps the 'Settings' option in the menu. Step 2: The user selects 'Appearance' in the Settings menu (State 19) to open font settings (State 20). Step 3: The user adjusts the font scale for subtitles using the subtitles font scale adjustment menu (State 23).
core_workflows.purpose: Enables users to customize the font scale for subtitles within the app.

core_workflows.description: Step 1: The user is on the Front Page (State 11) and taps the 'Settings' option in the menu. Step 2: The user selects 'Appearance' in the Settings menu (State 19) to open font settings (State 20). Step 3: The user adjusts the font scale for comment headers using the comment headers font scale adjustment menu (State 24).
core_workflows.purpose: Allows users to customize the font scale for comment headers within the app.

core_workflows.description: Step 1: The user is on the Front Page (State 11) and taps the 'Settings' option in the menu. Step 2: The user selects 'Appearance' in the Settings menu (State 19) to open font settings (State 20). Step 3: The user adjusts the global font scale using the global font scale adjustment menu (State 25).
core_workflows.purpose: Enables users to adjust the global font scale within the app.

core_workflows.description: Step 1: The user is on the Front Page (State 11) and taps the 'Settings' option in the menu. Step 2: The user selects 'Appearance' in the Settings menu (State 19) to open font settings (State 26).
core_workflows.purpose: Provides users with a comprehensive font settings menu to customize various font sizes and styles within the app.

core_workflows.description: Step 1: The user is on the Front Page (State 11) and taps the 'Settings' option in the menu. Step 2: The user selects 'Appearance' in the Settings menu (State 19) to open the main settings menu (State 27).
core_workflows.purpose: Offers users access to various app settings and customization options.

core_workflows.description: Step 1: The user is on the Front Page (State 11) and taps the 'Find Location' search bar. Step 2: The user selects a subreddit from the Subreddit Selection screen (State 13). Step 3: The user is presented with the Reddit User Agreement screen (State 14) and taps 'VIEW AGREEMENT'. Step 4: The user taps 'I Agree' to confirm acceptance, which loads the Reddit User Agreement confirmation (State 10).
core_workflows.purpose: Allows users to access content from specific subreddits after accepting the Reddit user agreement.

core_workflows.description: Step 1: The user is on the Front Page (State 11) and taps the 'Find Location' search bar. Step 2: The user selects a subreddit from the Subreddit Selection screen (State 13). Step 3: The user taps the 'Unpin from Main Menu' option in the Subreddit Management screen (State 15). Step 4: The user is returned to the Front Page (State 16).
core_workflows.purpose: Enables users to manage their pinned subreddits and remove them from the main menu.

core_workflows.description: Step 1: The user is on the Front Page (State 11) and taps the 'Find Location' search bar. Step 2: The user selects a subreddit from the Subreddit Selection screen (State 13). Step 3: The user is presented with the Reddit User Agreement screen (State 17) and taps 'VIEW AGREEMENT'. Step 4: The user taps 'I Agree' to confirm acceptance, which loads the Reddit User Agreement confirmation (State 18).
core_workflows.purpose: Allows users to access content from specific subreddits after accepting the Reddit user agreement.

core_workflows.description: Step 1: The user is on the Front Page (State 11) and taps the 'Find Location' search bar. Step 2: The user selects a subreddit from the Subreddit Selection screen (State 13). Step 3: The user is presented with the Reddit User Agreement screen (State 17) and taps 'CANCEL'. Step 4: The user is returned to the Front Page (State 11).
core_workflows.purpose: Allows users to cancel the agreement acceptance process and return to the Front Page.

core_workflows.description: Step 1: The user is on the Front Page (State 11) and taps the 'Find Location' search bar. Step 2: The user selects a subreddit from the Subreddit Selection screen (State 13). Step 3: The user is presented with the Reddit User Agreement screen (State 17) and taps 'DETAILS'. Step 4: The user taps 'I Agree' to confirm acceptance, which loads the Reddit User Agreement confirmation (State 10).
core_workflows.purpose: Allows users to view the details of the Reddit user agreement before accepting it.

core_workflows.purpose: Allows users to view the details of the Reddit user agreement before accepting it.
